description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a .m2/ cache and a MAVEN_OPTS variable set to use a local Maven repository. In the dependency_scanning stage add a dependency_scanning job that uses the docker:stable image with the docker:stable-dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, runs an export command to compute SP_VERSION from CI_SERVER_VERSION, then executes a docker run of the GitLab dependency‑scanning image with DEP_SCAN_DISABLE_REMOTE_CHECKS env, mounting the workspace and Docker socket, and always uploads gl-dependency-scanning-report.json as an artifact while allowing failure. In the maven-build stage add a maven-build job using maven:3-jdk-8 that runs "mvn clean verify javadoc:javadoc -B" and stores the target/ directory as an artifact. In the sonar stage add a sonar job using the same Maven image that runs "mvn sonar:sonar -s settings.xml". In the maven-deploy stage add an ossrh-staging job that runs only on the master branch (excluding features/ossrh), imports the GPG_PRIVATE_KEY with the provided passphrase, sets GPG_TTY, then runs "mvn deploy -s settings.xml"; finally, in the publish-doc stage add a pages job that runs only on master, creates a public folder, copies the generated Javadoc from target/site/apidocs into it, and publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact.
